speaker: speaker1
text: How far do we have to go ?

speaker: speaker1
text: The traffic is not very heavy on this high way , is it ? So I ’ m sure we ’ ll make it .

speaker: speaker2
text: No , but we ’ Ve got a hurry . It will be the rush hour soon .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don ’ t worry . There ’ s plenty of time yet .

speaker: speaker2
text: But it ’ s Friday today . This road is always jam packed during the weekend , isn ’ t it ?
